scripts.deps: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start:backend: cross-env RENODE_ROBOT_PORT=55555 npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.start:backend:daisy: cross-env RENODE_ROBOT_PORT=55555 RENODE_SCRIPT=zephyr/renode/daisy_seed.resc RENODE_MACHINES=daisy_0 RENODE_UART=sysbus.usart1 npm --prefix backend run start
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n renode,backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run start:renode" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:daisy: concurrently -k -n renode,backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run start:renode" "npm run start:backend:daisy" "npm run start:frontend"
